_doc: PR-gating baseline for the WCAG 2.2 a11y suite. `e2e/a11y/enforce-baseline.mjs` reads `a11y-report/a11y-report.json` produced by `wcag-audit.e2e.ts` and fails CI if (a) total axe violations exceed `maxTotalViolations`, (b) `report.totals.scanned === 0` or fewer than SCANNABLE_ROUTES.length minus `allowedSkippedRoutes` were scanned, or (c) any checklist item with kind != 'manual' is `fail` or `needs_review`. To intentionally accept a regression, raise `maxTotalViolations` and/or `allowedSkippedRoutes` in the same PR with reviewer sign-off and a remediation note. Lowering them after fixes is encouraged.
